tagging to describe the tempo of a track. It indicates how many beats are p[1D[K
present in one minute of audio. This information helps listeners determine [K

metadata that can be useful for organizing and searching through a music li[2D[K
library, as well as for creating playlists based on musical intensity or da[2D[K
danceability.
